stemHtml: In the OPS regulations, a runway is considered damp when…

options.a: it is covered with a film of water of less than 1 mm.
options.b: surface moisture gives it a shiny appearance.
options.c: its surface is not dry, and when surface moisture does not give it a shiny appearance.
options.d: it is covered with a film of water of less than 3 mm.
